subject: Quick thought on WHA's CE program
body:
Hi Leigh Ann,

Saw WHA is expanding its continuing-education tracks for member hospitals this year — that's a lot of completions to track across systems.

A few hospital associations I work with hit the same wall: members earn the credits, but the board can't see completion data in one place without manual pulls.

Worth a quick chat sometime? No pressure either way.

Pat

subject: PACB compliance training — quick question
body:
Hi Tricia,

With the new compliance-training requirement landing on member banks, proving who completed what — cleanly, when an examiner asks — tends to get harder fast.

Curious if that's on your radar at PACB. No pressure either way.

Pat

subject: MDA recertification cycle — quick thought
body:
Hi Sarah,

A new CE recertification cycle usually means a wave of members all trying to confirm their hours at once — and a lot of manual checking on your end.

Curious how you're planning to handle the tracking this round. Happy to share what's working for similar groups if it's ever useful.

Pat
